zh.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson於大約1046年與Eadgyth Of Wessex在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson于大约1046年与Eadgyth Of Wessex在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Strut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Strutt
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German struot, strūt ‘brush, thicket, swamp’, or a habitational name from any of several places called Struth with this word.

nameMeanings.name: Haraldsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Haraldsson: patronymic from the personal name Harald, Old Norse Haraldr (see Harold ). This is also an Americanized form of the Norwegian cognate Haraldsen. Compare Haralson , Haroldsen , Haroldson , and Harrelson .

variants.name: Harrelson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Haraldsen and, in some cases, also of Swedish Haraldsson (see Haraldson ). Compare Harelson and Harralson .

History: The first known bearer of the surname Harrelson was Paul Harrelson, Sr (in some sources his surname is spelled Harralson), born in the middle of the 17th century in Denmark or Norway (Norway was in a union with Denmark at that time), who in the 1670s or 1680s settled in New Kent County, VA. There appears to be only a few later immigrants from Norway or Sweden, whose Americanized surname was spelled the same way.

variants.name: Harold
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harold (Old Norse Haraldr, borrowed from an ancient Germanic form Harjawald). Alternatively, the name may arise from the Middle English personal name Harwold, Harold (Old English Hereweald), particularly in Suffolk, where there was also post-medieval confusion with Hurrell . These all go back to an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements heri, hari ‘army’ + wald ‘rule’, which is attested in Europe from an early date; the Roman historian Tacitus records a certain Cariovalda, chief of the ancient Germanic tribe of the Batavi, as early as the 1st century AD See also Herald .
English: habitational name from Harrold (Bedfordshire), from Old English hār ‘gray’ + wald ‘large tract of woodland, high woodland’.

Irish: this name is of direct Norse origin (see 1 above), but is also occasionally a variant of Harrell and Hurrell . Spellings without final d have been adopted as the Anglicized form of the Gaelic Ó hEarghail (see Harrell ).

variants.name: Haralson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Haraldsen and Swedish Haraldsson (see Haraldson ).

nameMeanings.name: Thorkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Torkel
meanings: from a contracted form of the Old Norse personal name Þorketill, from Þórr ( see Tor ) + ketill ‘kettle, helmet’.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Tall"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from a medieval pet form of Dietrich and other Germanic personal names with the same first element, þeud ‘people’.

en.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson married Eadgyth Of Wessex about 1046, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson a épousé Eadgyth Of Wessex environ 1046, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson hat um 1046 in Europa Eadgyth Of Wessex geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson lui sposato Eadgyth Of Wessex circa 1046, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldssonは約1046年にヨーロッパでEadgyth Of Wessexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson(은)는 대략 1046년 우럽에서 Eadgyth Of Wessex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson casou-se com Eadgyth Of Wessex aproximadamente 1046, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson женился на женщине по имени Eadgyth Of Wessex около 1046 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Thorkel "The Tall" "Thorlongus" Strut Haraldsson se casó con Eadgyth Of Wessex aproximadamente 1046, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
